summary: Iteration 4 production cutover frontend-only verification — ALL acceptance criteria from review pass. Real Solana mainnet integration, mint CA shown, presale stats wired to RPC, 5 tokenomics cards, 6 security pillars w/ Confirmed badges, 8 FAQ items, mobile drawer working, wallet-adapter modal opens with 4 wallet options, no Whitepaper/Treasury/Emergent badge in DOM, no JS console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: All 17 acceptance criteria verified pass: page meta (title contains GOAT7, /favicon.png, og:image present), all 7 sections present (hero/presale/tokenomics/roadmap/security/community/faq), no whitepaper-section, no 'treasury' substring anywhere in DOM, no Emergent badge.
Hero CA box shows literal mint '2JXLbne5axZvw4DHZGbkMmXTiJKg7SbAxrCYLFLYCTpM' (not TBA), Solscan button href correct with target=_blank, Copy button present.
Hero CTAs: hero-buy-button href=#presale, three socials (telegram→t.me/GOAT7Official, x→x.com/GOAT7official, website→goat7.xyz) all correct.
Header: header-buy-button href=#presale, header-connect-button text 'Connect Wallet', clicking opens wallet-adapter modal (role=dialog) showing Phantom, Solflare, Trust, Coinbase Wallet.

Presale section: countdown grid has 4 cells with numeric tabular values (01 Days / 06 Hours / 47 Min / 37 Sec at test time); status pill 'STARTS SOON'; progress bar style width 0%; live stats stat-tokens-sold=0, stat-remaining=1.00B, stat-participants=0, stat-price=1e-7 SOL (all numeric, none '—'). Recipient link href=https://solscan.io/account/J7DAPZyGwnbStmk6YUYHx9V7MjGgiaWhSFgVJ1g7q3x5.
Buy form: input min=0.05 max=5, all 5 preset buttons present (0.05/0.5/1/2/5), typing '1' gives 'You receive 10.00M $GOAT7', buy button label 'Connect Wallet'.
Tokenomics: exactly 5 cards (Liquidity 30% 3B, Marketing 15% 1.5B, Presale 10% 1B, Community Rewards 10% 1B, Team 5% 500M). Total supply card shows '10B' big + '10,000,000,000 GOAT7'.

Security: all 6 pillars present in exact order (Mint Authority Revoked, Freeze Authority Revoked, Update Authority Revoked, Community Driven, Fair Distribution, Solana Network), each with 'Confirmed' green badge data-testid security-status-0..5. No 'LP Burned' or 'Contract Renounced' substrings.
Community: 3 cards with correct hrefs and handles (@GOAT7Official / @GOAT7official / goat7.xyz).
FAQ section: exactly 8 accordion items with 8 unique questions, clicking expands (4 nested data-state=open elements observed for one expanded item — Radix accordion normal behavior).
Footer: x/telegram/website testids point to correct URLs, includes goat7.xyz, Solscan token page (1 anchor with href containing the mint), Solana Explorer.
Mobile (390x844): desktop header nav is display:none, mobile-menu-toggle is visible, opening drawer renders nav links + mobile-buy-button with href=#presale.

Console: 0 JS errors, 0 page errors. Only 1 acceptable warning 'Participants fetch failed: Failed to fetch' — explicitly tolerated per spec (Solana RPC rate limit on getSignaturesForAddress in some windows). No 403/CORS errors from RPC.

Minor observation (non-blocking): FAQ accordion appears to use type='multiple' (multiple items can be open simultaneously). Spec only requires that clicking expands — passes — but if single-open behaviour is desired, change <Accordion type='single' collapsible> in FAQ.jsx. Not a bug per acceptance criteria.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All acceptance criteria for the final production cutover pass. The site is ready. Recipient wallet J7DAPZyGwnbStmk6YUYHx9V7MjGgiaWhSFgVJ1g7q3x5 currently holds 0 SOL so all on-chain stats render 0 as expected. The 'Participants fetch failed' warning happens occasionally when getSignaturesForAddress rate-limits on the public RPC; the UI gracefully shows 0 and keeps polling every 30s. Do NOT actually click presale-buy-button after connecting a wallet — it would burn real SOL.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found in iteration 4. Iteration-3 ROADMAP Phase 01 'Treasury wallet & multi-sig setup' bullet was removed and replaced with 'Community Telegram & X live' — verified via DOM scan: document.body.innerText.toLowerCase().includes('treasury') === false.
